name: STAC Liability and Claims Extension
abstract: STAC extension for documenting liability claims, legal proceedings, and insurance information with comprehensive ISO 19115 quality reporting and W3C PROV provenance support

sources.title: ISO 19115-4:2021 Geographic Information - Metadata - Imagery and gridded data
W3C PROV-DM: The PROV Data Model

description:
This STAC extension provides comprehensive fields for documenting liability information and claims associated with geospatial data. It is designed to track incidents, damages, legal proceedings, insurance information, data quality/provenance, and ISO/IEC 20151 data-space governance for spatial data assets.

Key features:
- **Liability Claims Management**: Track claim status, types, jurisdictions, damages, and affected parties
- **ISO 19115/19115-4/ISO 19157 Quality**: Full support for completeness, accuracy, lineage, and imagery quality
- **NIIRS**: Sensor-specific National Imagery Interpretability Rating Scale ratings
- **DGIWG Compliance**: Defence geospatial quality elements
- **W3C PROV Provenance**: Complete PROV-JSON support for semantic web integration
- **Legal/Insurance**: Policy numbers, providers, evidence references, resolution tracking
- **ISO/IEC 20151 Data Spaces**: Data space identity, W3C ODRL usage policies, data contracts, and sovereignty constraints (GDPR Art.6, data residency)
- **Semantic Web**: JSON-LD context (valid prefix-only) + semantic-uplift.jsonld with OWL equivalentProperty mappings to Schema.org, FIBO, DQV, PROV, and CEOS ARD ontologies
